'''Bakkah''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Yoda" /> located in the [[Bakkah system/Legends|Bakkah system]], in the [[Thrasybule sector/Legends|Thrasybule sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim.]]<ref name="atlasindex" />

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
At the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] amulet was discovered on Bakkah, and both [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] raced to secure it, resulting in the [[Mission to Bakkah]].<ref name="Yoda" />
{{Noncanonend}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Coruscant Nights III: Patterns of Force]]'' {{Mo}}
